ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c, fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process",
OR( ( PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Stage 3 - Develop" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Stage 4 - Prove")),
( PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Stage 4 - Prove" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Stage 5 - Negotiation")),
( PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Stage 5 - Negotiation" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won")),
( (PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Stage 5 - Negotiation" || PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Stage 4 - Prove") && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost")) /* ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Stage 5 - Negotiation"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") */
),
OR( ISPICKVAL( BD_Region__c, "" ), ISPICKVAL( Sales_Campaign__c, "" ), ISPICKVAL( Pillar_1_2__c, "" ), ISPICKVAL( Type_Of_Customer__c, "" ), ISPICKVAL( Public_Tender__c, "" ), INCLUDES(Types_Of_Risk__c, "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please check if the Fields under section "Region & Sales Campaigns" OR "Competitive Information" not filled up for stage 4 and above. Both Section fields are important to filled up to proceed opportunity to stage 4 and above
